element_introduction_order.element: Basic straight and L-bend pipe pieces
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns to place pieces and form unbroken pipelines
Player learns complex routing; bonus awarded for crossing flooz through 4-way intersections
Player must complete pipeline before flooz flows; timing pressure increases
Later levels increase minimum length demands

element_introduction_order.element: Pre-placed obstacles and fixed pipe sections
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player must navigate around unmovable pieces; reduces available space
Flooz must reach designated end or game ends immediately, even if length met
Adds spatial complexity; flooz can exit and re-enter at opposite boundaries
Flow direction is constrained; player must plan routes respecting directional restrictions
Provides brief time extension; bonus points for filling them
Reduces reaction time; increases pressure to pre-plan pipelines
Less time to complete pipeline before flooz begins moving

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully routing flooz through entire pipeline
Reaching minimum length requirement before flooz gets stuck
Bonus round after every 4th level (grid-sliding puzzle, lower stakes)
typical_tension_triggers: Increasing flow speed in later levels
Shortened delays before flooz begins moving
Appearance of drain piece requirement (game-ending penalty if missed)
Pre-placed obstacles reducing available grid space
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating pressure cycle: preparation phase (place pipes freely) transitions to execution phase (flooz flows). Early levels allow generous placement time; mid-to-late levels compress decision windows through faster flow speeds and shorter delays. Tension releases temporarily every 4th level via bonus round.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus points available for exceeding minimum pipeline length; dispensed pieces encourage strategic length exploration beyond requirements
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Four-way intersections grant large bonuses when flooz crosses itself exactly 5 times in a single level; encourages specific routing patterns

difficulty_curve.early_game: Generous time windows, basic piece types (straight, L-bends), high tolerance for suboptimal routing. Focus on learning placement mechanics.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of T-junctions and 4-way pieces; first appearance of pre-placed obstacles and drain pieces. Minimum lengths increase. Flow speeds increase moderately.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Wrap-around edges, one-way restrictions, multiple obstacles, compressed timers, high flow speeds. Spatial planning becomes critical. Each mistake ends run.
notable_spikes: First appearance of drain piece (immediate game-over if missed)
Introduction of wrap-around edge mechanics (spatial disorientation)
Compressed flow delay timers (reaction pressure increase)

notable_level_patterns.description: Entry point marked on grid, random pipe pieces from dispenser, flooz flow after delay. Goal: reach minimum length before flooz gets blocked or exits improperly.
Pre-placed fixed pipe sections occupy grid squares, cannot be replaced. Reduces available routing space; forces optimization.
Designated end piece appears on field. Flooz must be routed to this specific endpoint. Missing it fails the level immediately, regardless of length met.

Grid of pre-placed pipe sections with one empty space. Player slides pieces into the gap (Fifteen Puzzle mechanic). Build longest pipeline possible from the configuration. Awards password for level skip.
Grid openings at opposite boundaries allow flooz to exit one side and re-enter the other. Adds spatial complexity and non-intuitive routing possibilities.

sources_used: wikipedia - Pipe Mania article (gameplay mechanics, level progression details, obstacles, reservoirs, one-way pipes, bonus rounds)
